message:
chore: unexport 12 dead symbols in internal/gitlab

Unexport package-internal symbols with no external callers:
- IsValidState, IssueLinksToDependencies, FilterNonScopedLabels, PriorityFromLabels
- StatusFromLabelsAndState, TypeFromLabels, StateCache, ParseLabelPrefix
- TypeMapping, GetPriorityFromLabel, GetStatusFromLabel, GetTypeFromLabel

Kept exported: Milestone, IssueLinks, SyncStats (used in exported struct fields),
IssueConversion (exported function return type), PriorityMapping, StatusMapping
(referenced in external tests), Label/Project/Namespace/IssueLink (types with
substring complexity in field names).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
